architectural_invariants.statement: Source obligations remain traceable to structured rows.

artifact_families.statement: This source contributes to source inventory, obligation index, and component map.

authority_boundaries.statement: Raw inputs remain authority inputs; structured rows are derived governance artifacts.

certification_requirements.statement: Downstream governance consumes refreshed source indexes and matching policy digests.

explicit_non_goals.statement: This ingestion slice does not implement roadmap compilation or execution automation.

fail_closed_requirements.statement: Completeness validation fails closed for missing required sources.

failure_modes.statement: Missing required source evidence blocks governance progression.

key_components.statement: # Production Ai Workflow Best Practices This source must preserve artifact authority.

observability_requirements.statement: Inventory/index entries must expose source availability and obligation linkage.

replayability_requirements.statement: Repeat sync over unchanged inputs produces stable raw filenames and deterministic indexes.

required_schemas.statement: Structured source artifact must satisfy source_design_extraction schema.

roadmap_implications.statement: Roadmap planning must reference refreshed source authority indexes.

sequencing_constraints.statement: Index and digest refresh must run after structured-source sync.

sre_alignment.statement: Fail-closed authority checks reduce silent drift and stale-policy risk.
